description: WSFS Financial Corporation operates as the savings and loan holding company for the Wilmington Savings Fund Society, FSB that provides various banking services in the United States. It operates through WSFS Bank, Cash Connect, and Wealth and Trust segments. The company offers deposit products, including noninterest-bearing demand deposits, money market, and interest-bearing demand deposits, as well as certificates of deposit and jumbo certificates of deposit. It also provides loans, such as commercial and industrial loans, commercial mortgage loans, and construction and land development loans,
